questions.prompt: A student is discussing a project with her study partner. What did her study partner wonder?
questions.prompt_context: A student is discussing a project with her study partner.
questions.prompt_task_text: What did her study partner wonder?
questions.answer: Her study partner wondered why the professor changed the due date.

questions.prompt: You are at the botanical garden with a friend. What do you say?
questions.prompt_context: You are at the botanical garden with a friend.
questions.prompt_task_text: What do you say?
questions.answer: I have no idea where the rare orchid display is.

questions.prompt: You are talking to a neighbor about a community event. What do you ask them?
questions.prompt_context: You are talking to a neighbor about a community event.
questions.prompt_task_text: What do you ask them?
questions.answer: Do you know where they are holding the block party?

questions.prompt: You're comparing two yoga studios with a friend. Tell your friend what you think.
questions.prompt_context: You're comparing two yoga studios with a friend.
questions.prompt_task_text: Tell your friend what you think.
questions.answer: I would love to know which studio offers the more challenging advanced class.

questions.prompt: Your elderly neighbor is confused about the recycling schedule. What do you say?
questions.prompt_context: Your elderly neighbor is confused about the recycling schedule.
questions.prompt_task_text: What do you say?
questions.answer: I have not received the new schedule yet.

questions.prompt: A volunteer is coordinating with some colleagues. What did some colleagues need to know?
questions.prompt_context: A volunteer is coordinating with some colleagues.
questions.prompt_task_text: What did some colleagues need to know?
questions.answer: Some colleagues were not sure what time the meeting started.

questions.prompt: Some colleagues are discussing a project deadline. What did they want to know?
questions.prompt_context: Some colleagues are discussing a project deadline.
questions.prompt_task_text: What did they want to know?
questions.answer: Some colleagues wondered why the meeting was postponed until next week.

questions.prompt: A young architect is at a project meeting. What does he say?
questions.prompt_context: A young architect is at a project meeting.
questions.prompt_task_text: What does he say?
questions.answer: The architect did not understand the revised plan.

questions.prompt: A volunteer is coordinating with the manager. What did the manager inquire?
questions.prompt_context: A volunteer is coordinating with the manager.
questions.prompt_task_text: What did the manager inquire?
questions.answer: The manager inquired when the new supplies would arrive.

questions.prompt: You are scheduling a haircut at a salon. What do you ask the receptionist?
questions.prompt_context: You are scheduling a haircut at a salon.
questions.prompt_task_text: What do you ask the receptionist?
questions.answer: Would you mind telling me when your next available appointment is?

questions.prompt: Her study partner is checking their notes. What did her study partner need to know?
questions.prompt_context: Her study partner is checking their notes.
questions.prompt_task_text: What did her study partner need to know?
questions.answer: Her study partner needed to know where the professor held office hours.

questions.prompt: The local librarian is helping an exchange student. What did the librarian want to know?
questions.prompt_context: The local librarian is helping an exchange student.
questions.prompt_task_text: What did the librarian want to know?
questions.answer: The librarian needed to find out if the student had a library card.

questions.prompt: An exchange student is at the post office. What does the clerk tell them about their package?
questions.prompt_context: An exchange student is at the post office.
questions.prompt_task_text: What does the clerk tell them about their package?
questions.answer: The package you were expecting has been delivered to the front desk.

questions.prompt: At the hair salon, the stylist speaks to a client. What does the stylist want to know?
questions.prompt_context: At the hair salon, the stylist speaks to a client.
questions.prompt_task_text: What does the stylist want to know?
questions.answer: The stylist wondered what time you arrived.

questions.prompt: You are grocery shopping and can't find an item. Tell your friend what you need to find out.
questions.prompt_context: You are grocery shopping and can't find an item.
questions.prompt_task_text: Tell your friend what you need to find out.
questions.answer: I need to find out where they keep the organic vegetables.

questions.prompt: You are talking to a neighbor about a home repair issue. What do you tell them you are unsure about?
questions.prompt_context: You are talking to a neighbor about a home repair issue.
questions.prompt_task_text: What do you tell them you are unsure about?
questions.answer: I am not sure when the plumber is scheduled to arrive.

questions.prompt: The librarian saw a student looking confused near the reference section. What did the librarian wonder?
questions.prompt_context: The librarian saw a student looking confused near the reference section.
questions.prompt_task_text: What did the librarian wonder?
questions.answer: The librarian wondered why the student looked so confused.

questions.prompt: The elderly neighbor is speaking with a postal worker. What was the neighbor curious about?
questions.prompt_context: The elderly neighbor is speaking with a postal worker.
questions.prompt_task_text: What was the neighbor curious about?
questions.answer: The elderly neighbor was curious why the package had not arrived.

questions.prompt: You are at a community center art class. What do you tell the instructor?
questions.prompt_context: You are at a community center art class.
questions.prompt_task_text: What do you tell the instructor?
questions.answer: I am not sure where we should put our finished paintings.

questions.prompt: The yoga instructor is speaking with a new student. How does the student respond about the schedule?
questions.prompt_context: The yoga instructor is speaking with a new student.
questions.prompt_task_text: How does the student respond about the schedule?
questions.answer: The student has not received any confirmation about the schedule.
